title: astragalus montis-varvashti
intro: Astragalus montis-varvashti, also known as the Himalayan astragalus or astragalus, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of astragalus montis-varvashti include enhancing the immune system, reducing oxidative stress, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus montis-varvashti can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, with herbal preparations often combining it with other medicinal plants to boost its effects.
